name: Hydra Communications Ltd (EU)
notes:
Suggested max prefixes

IPv4 2000
IPv6 1000

We welcome and encourage dual-stack peering at all locations.

Should traffic levels exceed 10Gbps between our networks we welcome establishing a PNI. Multiple locations is preferred however not required.

Please note all IX route server learned routes have the same local preference value as T1 carriers. For a higher route preference via IXP's please establish bilateral peering with us.
